testcase.name: parse_KnownGoodPdf_ReturnsNineRaces

testcase.name: parse_NonExistentFile_ReturnsSuccessWithNoRaces
testcase.system-out: 09:03:17.418 [main] ERROR com.robinhowlett.chartparser.ChartParser -- /does/not/exist.pdf (No such file or directory) java.io.FileNotFoundException: /does/not/exist.pdf (No such file or directory) at java.base/java.io.RandomAccessFile.open0(Native Method) at java.base/java.io.RandomAccessFile.open(RandomAccessFile.java:356) at testcase.name: parse_EmptyFile_ReturnsSuccessWithNoRaces
